goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'stansted airport' and should 'arrive by 17:30'.
The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'centre' and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
The restaurant should serve 'romanian' food.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'european' food.
Make sure you get 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a train. The train should go to stansted airport and should arrive by 17:30
The train should leave on tuesday and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get travel time
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the centre and should be in the expensive price range
The restaurant should serve romanian food
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves european food
